{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = G-Thirty-Nine Combat Test: Sable Township
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[G-Thirty-Nine Combat Test: Sable Township]] resulted in an estimated seventy-two percent casualties.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
